mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, importance, writer, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM notices WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY FIELD(importance, 'urgent', 'important', 'normal'), created_at DESC

SELECT id, title, content, importance, writer, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM notices WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY FIELD(importance, 'urgent', 'important', 'normal'), created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notices WHERE is_active = 1 AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
SELECT id, title, content, importance, writer, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM notices WHERE id = #{id} AND is_active = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notices (title, content, importance, writer) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{importance}, #{writer})
mapper.update: UPDATE notices SET is_active = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
